body.title: Delete /goal and /audit-goal skills + remove from manifest
body.intention: I intend that the /goal and /audit-goal skills are gone — not deprecated-in-place, deleted — and the manifest.json no longer lists them as active skills.
body.description:
skills/goal/ and skills/audit-goal/ are live skill directories that still provide the retired G-xxx goal-management surface. goals are retired per D-intention-based-development-2026-06-04 and the 'delete-after-successful-merge' principle — these skill files are the remove-behind, not already-deleted artifacts. They must go.

**Affected files:** skills/goal/ (directory + contents), skills/audit-goal/ (directory + contents), skills/manifest.json (remove their entries — or mark 'retired: see intention field on tickets').
**Design rules:** delete-after-successful-merge, goals-being-retired, rip-out-over-deprecate-in-place.
**Scope boundary:** IN - delete skills/goal/ and skills/audit-goal/ directories entirely; remove their entries from manifest.json. OUT - the actual goal-language inside other skill files (those have their own tickets). OUT - historical records in devlab/runtime/memory/ (frozen, append-only). OUT - skills symlinks in ~/.claude/skills/ — check if they're symlinks to skills/ (per NO-skills-sync-symlink-only rule) and handle accordingly (delete the symlink if deleting the canonical).
**Test plan:** ls skills/goal skills/audit-goal -> both absent. grep skills/manifest.json for 'goal' and 'audit-goal' -> 0 active entries. No broken symlinks under ~/.claude/skills/ referencing deleted directories.
**Completion criteria:** `ls skills/goal/ 2>&1` exits non-zero; `ls skills/audit-goal/ 2>&1` exits non-zero; `grep -c '"goal"\|"audit-goal"' skills/manifest.json` returns 0 active entries.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Deleted skills/goal/ and skills/audit-goal/ + symlinks. Manifest had no entries. grep for goal/audit-goal in skills/ returns 0 active prompts.
body.unproven_reason: skill deletion; no executable harness for skill directory presence
